text.title: spatial-computing-overview Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for spatial-computing-overview as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Recommending a platform without naming the modality (AR vs VR vs MR).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Different modalities require different hardware, input models, comfort budgets, and SDKs; the recommendation is not actionable without the label.

failure-mode.description: Choosing a platform purely by install base without checking distribution constraints (enterprise MDM, region availability, certification).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Large install base on a closed store is irrelevant if the product cannot ship on it.

failure-mode.description: Mixing 2D-app reasoning ("just port the mobile app") into spatial recommendations.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Spatial UX requires depth, comfort, and input redesign; a port without rethink fails usability.
